title: glechoma hederacea var. heterophylla
intro: Glechoma hederacea var. heterophylla, commonly known as creeping thyme or creeping Jenny, is a type of perennial herb belonging to the mint family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of creeping thyme include its ability to soothe digestive problems, relieve respiratory issues, and alleviate stress and anxiety. It can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing users to harness its health benefits and enjoy the plant's numerous advantages.
